text.title: LLM Fine-tuning (General Guide) — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `finetuning` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: Mistral-7B tone classifier
section.p: Task: classify customer-support reply tone (apologetic / neutral / assertive). 4200 labelled examples. Single A100 (40GB).

list.item: Step 3: gap to target 90% is 22pts → ≥10 → proceed.
Step 6: trained 3 epochs r=16 alpha=32; eval-gate 88% accuracy + 91% f1 → both beat baseline → eval_gate_passed=true. rollback_owner=ml-lead:bob.
